name: Baked Eggplant Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper, halved and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Halve the eggplant lengthwise and brush all sides with olive oil. Place the halves cut-side down on a baking sheet. Bake for 25 minutes.
3. Brush the onion, garlic, and red pepper with oil and add them to the eggplant. Continue baking for 25-30 minutes longer or until the vegetables are tender.
4. Allow the eggplant to cool, then scoop out the flesh into a food processor or wooden bowl.
5. Squeeze the garlic pulp from its skins, peel the red pepper, and add it along with the onion, oregano, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper to the eggplant mixture.
6. Process or finely chop by hand. Do not puree.
7. Mix in 3 oz of the feta cheese into the mixture.
8. Spoon the mixture into a serving bowl. Sprinkle the remaining feta cheese around the edge of the mixture and mound parsley in the center. Serve with pita bread or crackers.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
